corrections.evidence_note: binutils-2_25, binutils-2_25_1, and binutils-2_26 source lack the expected file-size guard.
corrections.reason: Release source lacks the amt > bfd_get_size(abfd) archive extended-name-table guard, so these releases still match vulnerable behavior.

corrections.evidence_note: binutils-2_33_1 source lacks the expected overflow guard.
corrections.reason: Release source still has bare total_size += msec->size without the overflow guard.

corrections.evidence_note: binutils-2_35_2 source lacks the expected relocation-entry-size guard.
corrections.reason: Release source lacks the hdr->sh_entsize == sizeof_rel/sizeof_rela guard.

corrections.evidence_note: External backportfix result and binutils-2_28 source both show the NULL guards already present.
corrections.reason: Release source already has the find_link NULL guards although the dataset label expected vulnerable.

corrections.evidence_note: External backportfix result and binutils-2_28 source both show the sh_link bounds guard already present.
corrections.reason: Release source already has the sh_link >= elf_numsections guard although the dataset label expected vulnerable.

corrections.evidence_note: Primary category backportfix; secondary patch_evolution because commit a961cdd5f13 rewrote the original PR20908 patch shape.
corrections.reason: External backportfix result marks 2.28 as backported; PR20908 later evolved, so the original error string is not a reliable label anchor.

corrections.evidence_note: External backportfix result and binutils-2_35 source show the fix already present.
corrections.reason: Release source frees and nulls both buckets and chains although the dataset label expected vulnerable.

corrections.evidence_note: External backportfix result and binutils-2_35 source show the fix already present.
corrections.reason: Release source guards num_of_syms assignment with buckets != NULL && chains != NULL although the dataset label expected vulnerable.

corrections.evidence_note: External backportfix result and binutils-2_35 source show the fix already present.
corrections.reason: Release source has the spec_var->file != NULL guard although the dataset label expected vulnerable.

corrections.evidence_note: External backportfix result and binutils-2_35 source show the fix already present.
corrections.reason: Release source guards nodename and symbol->name before strcmp although the dataset label expected vulnerable.

description: Groundtruth corrections derived from source-review categories backportfix and missing_fix_in_release in binutils_error_statistics.md.

policy.backportfix: Move version from vuln to patch.
policy.missing_fix_in_release: Move version from patch to vuln.
